items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical Netty HTTP2 Advertised MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS are not enforced CVE-2023
id: 805005ae-c1ec-5257-b8a6-83d10940b5de
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2023-44487 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-44487
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2023-44487 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T21:41:19Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2023-44487", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2023-44487 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6043748; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] CVE / Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 5.0/10). EPSS 94.39% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Exploit Public-Facing Application, Command and Scripting Interpreter (2 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: LOW (35%) - limited source data available.

modified: 2026/06/13

logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-0714 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T21:41:19Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-0714", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-0714 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1373720; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: Fortinet patched a new critical FortiSandbox flaw
items.description: Fortinet patched a critical FortiSandbox vulnerability that could let unauthenticated attackers remotely execute commands via crafted HTTP requests. Fortinet released security updates to address several vulnerabilities affecting FortiSandbox, FortiOS, FortiProxy, and FortiPortal. The most severe issue, tracked as CVE-2026-25089 (CVSS score of 9.8), is an OS command injection flaw in FortiSandbox products. The vulnerability could […]

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium Security Vulnerability CVE-2026-42535
id: e0449e29-4d16-5019-b210-77e4258d1e36
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-42535 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: DOS
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42535
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-42535 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T21:41:19Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-42535", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-42535 Exploitation Attempt - DOS"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:9613797; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P3] CVE / Vulnerability - low severity (Risk 4.0/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Exploitation for Client Execution, Data from Information Repositories, Endpoint Denial of Service (3 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: LOW (26%) - limited source data available.

items.title: File Browser has a Command Execution Allowlist Bypass via Shell Metacharacter Injection
items.description:
> [!NOTE]
> **This feature has been disabled by default for all installations from v2.33.8 onwards, including for existent installations**. To exploit this vulnerability, the instance administrator must turn on a feature and ignore all the warnings about known vulnerabilities. We're publishing this new advisory to make it clear that all vulnerabilities concerning this feature are disclosed.
>
> For more information about tracking vulnerability issues related to the Command Execution features, check https://github.com/filebrowser/filebrowser/issues/5199.

## Summary

When a shell interpreter is configured (e.g. `/bin/sh -c`), the command allowlist can be bypassed through shell metacharacters. The allowlist validates only the first token of user input, but the entire raw string is handed to the shell — semicolons, pipes, backticks, and `$()` all work to chain arbitrary commands after a permitted one.

This is a distinct issue from CVE-2025-52995 (regex partial matching, fixed in 2.33.10)
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] Vulnerability advisory. Risk score 7.6/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Medium GPTranslate  231 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting via REST A
id: 6d7b4c1d-2cfd-555e-983c-1a893224117c
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-9109 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9109
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/13
modified: 2026/06/13
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-9109 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-13T21:41:19Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-9109", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-9109 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:4428693; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-13, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P3] CVE / Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 5.3/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Exploit Public-Facing Application, Command and Scripting Interpreter, Steal Web Session Cookie, Exploitation of Remote Services (4 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: LOW (26%) - limited source data available.
